en.title: Position Interviewer
en.prompt: I want you to act as an interviewer. I will be the candidate and you will ask me the interview questions for the [position]. I want you to only reply as the interviewer. Do not write all the conservation at once. I want you to only do the interview with me. Ask me the questions and wait for my answers. Do not write explanations. Ask me the questions one by one like an interviewer does and wait for my answers. My first sentence is [Hi]

related.title: Product Manager
related.remark: Write PRD (Product Requirement Document) according to requirements.

related.title: startup idea generator
related.remark: Write a business plan in markdown table format around the planning goals.

related.title: advertiser
related.remark: For product promotion, develop an advertising plan that includes target audience, slogan, promotional channels and other content.

metaDescription: Preparing for a job? Be interviewed for any position. Answer questions one-by-one to practice and improve your interview skills.

faq.q: Are the AI's interview questions at the right difficulty?
faq.a: Most align with reality, but technical interviews may reach for outdated tools (jQuery, AngularJS). Before a real interview, cross-reference AI questions with recent job listings to fill in high-frequency modern-stack questions it misses.

Yes, start with "use stress interview style: after each answer follow up with one tough question, point out any holes in the answer directly." Without specifying, the AI defaults to friendly. For pressure practice you need to set this up explicitly.
